title: Indexes to String operations should be within the string's bounds
description: This rule raises an issue when a negative literal or an index that is too large is passed as an argument to the String::substring, String::charAt, and related methods.
recommendation: Ensure that indexes passed to String operations are within the string's bounds.
impact: Potential runtime errors and security vulnerabilities.

checks.message: Ensure that indexes passed to String operations are within the string's bounds.
